title: Investors invested in multiples projects
excerpt:
Hi, 
We have investors that are involved within 3 of our projects (each with their own separate board). Is there a way to view the projects (boards) and investment amounts the investor is involved in from their personal …

posts.author: socansey (Sidney Ocansey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We have investors that are involved within 3 of our projects (each with their own separate board). Is there a way to view the projects (boards) and investment amounts the investor is involved in from their personal profile? Also, if we add the investor to a specific project (board), is there a way to have this project automatically show up within their personal profile?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @socansey,

Can you specify what you mean by personal profile? If they’ve been invited to their boards as guests or as team members into the platform, they should have access to those specific boards only, and they should be appearing as soon as they log-in

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
For example, this section?

Screen Shot 2024-03-20 at 11.56.56 am2534×1280 150 KB

If this is the case I am afraid this isn’t currently possible - but I like this idea and will certainly share this internally as feedback!

posts.author: socansey (Sidney Ocansey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday Screenshot2955×1684 347 KB

Or within this area after clicking on the contacts name

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ah thank you for clarifying!

Whilst you can see which boards are connected to the item (/contact) via that view, it will not show a high level summary of which project boards the investor is apart of - again, great feedback!

posts.author: socansey (Sidney Ocansey)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to view high level summaries?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is possible if you were to create a high level board for each investor, and connect those low-level (/project boards).

  • High Level + Low Level boards

Alternatively, you can also create a dashboard for each investor and connect those their boards, utilising widgets to breakdown data from a high-level.

  • Dashboards

Let me know what you think!

posts.author: socansey (Sidney Ocansey)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ll look into that. Thank you for all your help, Bianca!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Not a problem! Reach out if you need an extra hand at any point
